steps.title: Identify the main verb structure
steps.content:
The phrase found Mihvs migrans eggs to be longer is a complete verb phrase with its own object and complement.

This signals that found must be the main verb of the second independent clause.

For this to work, compared the lengths of eggs produced by different bird species must function as a relative clause modifying study, not as the main verb—which requires a relative pronoun immediately after study.

steps.title: Select the relative pronoun pattern
steps.content:
A restrictive relative clause uses 'that' without a comma before it.

The correct structure is study that, making found the main verb of the clause.

Choices A and B incorrectly place a comma before the relative pronoun; choice C omits the pronoun entirely, leaving compared without proper grammatical function.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
